There is...

title: Crimea: Attack attack

description: Ukraine strikes Russian patrol ship in Sea of Azov, confirms damage to St. Petersburg oil terminal. The vessel, measuring nearly 50 meters in length, was struck near the settlement of Iurkine in Russian-occupied Crimea, Unmanned Systems Forces commander Robert "Magyar" Brovdi said on Telegram.

The vessel, measuring nearly 50 meters in length, was struck near the settlement of Iurkine in Russian-occupied Crimea, Unmanned Systems Forces commander Robert "Magyar" Brovdi said on Telegram.

description: "SCORPIO". The creation of a new special unit was officially presented by the Military Law and Order Service in the Armed Forces of Ukraine ⚡️ "SCORPION" - the rapid response and sudden action department of the zonal departments of the Military Law and Order Service. Modern challenges require fast, professional and decisive actions. The "SCORPION" unit was created as part of the VSP specifically to respond to threats of increased level of danger....
description_en: "SCORPIO". The creation of a new special unit was officially presented by the Military Law and Order Service in the Armed Forces of Ukraine ⚡️ "SCORPION" - the rapid response and sudden action department of the zonal departments of the Military Law and Order Service. Modern challenges require fast, professional and decisive actions. The "SCORPION" unit was created as part of the VSP specifically to respond to threats of increased level of danger....
description_uk: "СКОРПІОН". Створення нового спецпідрозділу офіційно презентувала Військова служба правопорядку у Збройних Силах України ⚡️ «СКОРПІОН» — відділення швидкого реагування та раптової дії зональних відділів Військової служби правопорядку. Сучасні виклики вимагають швидких, професійних і рішучих дій. Саме для реагування на загрози підвищеного рівня небезпеки у складі ВСП створено підрозділ «СКОРПІОН»....

description: Russia has changed its air strike tactics: more and more missiles are breaking through the Ukrainian air defense, CNN Izdanie writes that Moscow terrorists first launch large groups of cheap drones, then ballistic missiles and cruise missiles. This overloads the air defense system and increases the probability that some of the missiles will reach the targets. At the same time, analysts believe that the increase in air terror is also connected with the problems of the Russian Federation on...
description_en: Russia has changed its air strike tactics: more and more missiles are breaking through the Ukrainian air defense, CNN Izdanie writes that Moscow terrorists first launch large groups of cheap drones, then ballistic missiles and cruise missiles. This overloads the air defense system and increases the probability that some of the missiles will reach the targets. At the same time, analysts believe that the increase in air terror is also connected with the problems of the Russian Federation on...
description_uk: рф изменила тактику воздушных ударов: все больше ракет прорывают украинскую ПВО, — CNN Издание пишет, что московские террористы сначала запускают большие группы дешевых дронов, затем — баллистику и крылатые ракеты. Это перегружает систему ПВО и увеличивает вероятность того, что часть ракет достигнет целей. При этом аналитики считают, что усиление воздушного террора связано и с проблемами рф на...

title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про постраждалих
description: Today is the day of remembrance of the children killed by Russia. In the official language it is called differently, but in the language of truth it sounds exactly like that. This day is about the most painful episodes of the war, about the greatest injustice and evil committed by Russia - when the most defenseless and the most innocent die. Children. Now there are at least 707 Ukrainian children. And thousands more children who were injured and kidnapped by Russia, thousands of children whose fate is still...
description_en: Today is the day of remembrance of the children killed by Russia. In the official language it is called differently, but in the language of truth it sounds exactly like that. This day is about the most painful episodes of the war, about the greatest injustice and evil committed by Russia - when the most defenseless and the most innocent die. Children. Now there are at least 707 Ukrainian children. And thousands more children who were injured and kidnapped by Russia, thousands of children whose fate is still...
description_uk: Сьогодні день пам’яті дітей, яких вбила Росія. Офіційною мовою він називається інакше, але мовою правди це звучить саме так. Цей день – про найболючіші епізоди війни, про найбільшу несправедливість і зло, яке чинить Росія, – коли гинуть найнезахищеніші та найбільш невинні. Діти. Зараз це щонайменше 707 українських дітей. І ще тисячі дітей, яких Росія поранила, викрала, тисячі дітей, чия доля досі...

title: 1️⃣2️⃣Summer tourist season in Odesa - you can, if you're careful The...

title_uk: 1️⃣2️⃣Літній туристичний сезон в Одесі - можна, якщо бути уважним...
description: 1️⃣2️⃣Summer tourist season in Odesa - you can, if you're careful The coast of Odesa is now, in fact, the only place in Ukraine to relax by the sea. Since enemy UAVs and missiles regularly fly into the city from the sea, not only crabs and mussels can be found in the water, but also the wreckage of downed drones and sea mines. However, this does not particularly frighten tourists, so the region is preparing to welcome guests. About housing prices and...
description_en: 1️⃣2️⃣Summer tourist season in Odesa - you can, if you're careful The coast of Odesa is now, in fact, the only place in Ukraine to relax by the sea. Since enemy UAVs and missiles regularly fly into the city from the sea, not only crabs and mussels can be found in the water, but also the wreckage of downed drones and sea mines. However, this does not particularly frighten tourists, so the region is preparing to welcome guests. About housing prices and...
description_uk: 1️⃣2️⃣Літній туристичний сезон в Одесі – можна, якщо обережно Узбережжя Одещини — зараз, фактично, єдине місце в Україні для відпочинку біля моря. Оскільки на місто з моря регулярно летять ворожі БПЛА і ракети, у воді можна знайти не лише крабів та мідій, а й уламки збитих дронів та морські міни. Втім туристів це не особливо лякає, тому регіон готується зустрічати гостей. Про ціни на житло та...

title: 700 missiles launched
title_en: 700 missiles launched
title_uk: Випущено 700 ракет
description: Russia is capable of using up to 100 ballistic missiles every month without depleting its reserves, - GUR According to intelligence, this year Russia plans to produce up to 700 missiles for the Iskander complexes - about the same number as last year. In addition, the production of missiles for the S-300/S-400 complexes, which the Russians use to strike ground targets, more than doubled. Also in 2026...
description_en: Russia is capable of using up to 100 ballistic missiles every month without depleting its reserves, - GUR According to intelligence, this year Russia plans to produce up to 700 missiles for the Iskander complexes - about the same number as last year. In addition, the production of missiles for the S-300/S-400 complexes, which the Russians use to strike ground targets, more than doubled. Also in 2026...
description_uk: русня способна ежемесячно применять до 100 баллистических ракет, не истощая свои запасы, — ГУР По данным разведки, в этом году русня планирует изготовить до 700 ракет для комплексов «Искандер» — примерно столько же, сколько и в прошлом году. Кроме того, более чем вдвое выросло производство ракет для комплексов С-300/С-400, которые россияне используют для ударов по наземным целям. Также в 2026...

title: Kyiv: 🪖🤝 "Heart of Azovstal" launches the "Veteran and Community" project...
title_en: Kyiv: 🪖🤝 "Heart of Azovstal" launches the "Veteran and Community" project...
title_uk: Київ: 🪖🤝 «Серце Азовсталі» запускає проект «Ветеран і громада»...
description: 🪖🤝 "Heart of Azovstal" launches the "Veteran and Community" project for the development of veteran-centricity in Ukraine The new project will help communities create effective support systems for veterans and conditions for their self-realization. Bucha and Kamianske became pilot communities. The project is implemented on the initiative of the Rinat Akhmetov Foundation in cooperation with the Kyiv School of Economics (KSE) and the American organization...
description_en: 🪖🤝 "Heart of Azovstal" launches the "Veteran and Community" project for the development of veteran-centricity in Ukraine The new project will help communities create effective support systems for veterans and conditions for their self-realization. Bucha and Kamianske became pilot communities. The project is implemented on the initiative of the Rinat Akhmetov Foundation in cooperation with the Kyiv School of Economics (KSE) and the American organization...
description_uk: 🪖🤝«Серце Азовсталі» запускає проєкт «Ветеран і громада» для розвитку ветераноцентричності в Україні Новий проєкт допомагатиме громадам створювати ефективні системи підтримки ветеранів та умови для їхньої самореалізації. Пілотними громадами стали Буча та Кам’янське. Проєкт реалізується за ініціативи Фонду Ріната Ахметова у співпраці з Київською школою економіки (KSE) та американською організацією...

description: June 4 - Day of commemoration of children who died as a result of the armed aggression of the Russian Federation against Ukraine Ukraine and the Armed Forces of Ukraine bow their heads to the memory of all Ukrainian children whose lives were cut short by the Russian war. ✅According to the Office of the General Prosecutor, as of the morning of June 4, 2026, as a result of Russian aggression, 707 children were killed, another 2,548 were injured in various ways...

description_uk: 4 червня - День вшанування пам’яті дітей, які загинули внаслідок збройної агресії російської федерації проти України Україна та Збройні Сили України схиляють голови перед пам’яттю всіх українських дітей, чиї життя обірвала російська війна. ✅За даними Офісу Генерального прокурора, станом на ранок 4 червня 2026 року, внаслідок російської агресії загинули 707 дітей, ще 2548 зазнали поранень різного...

title: Kherson: 293 drones intercepted
title_en: Kherson: 293 drones intercepted
title_uk: Херсон: перехоплено 293 дрони
description: 16 killed, 86 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day, massive drone assault hits Kherson. The Air Force said Russia launched 293 drones, 264 of which were intercepted. At least 24 drones struck 11 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 12 sites.
description_en: 16 killed, 86 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day, massive drone assault hits Kherson. The Air Force said Russia launched 293 drones, 264 of which were intercepted. At least 24 drones struck 11 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 12 sites.
description_uk: 16 killed, 86 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day, massive drone assault hits Kherson. The Air Force said Russia launched 293 drones, 264 of which were intercepted. At least 24 drones struck 11 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 12 sites.

title: Kyiv: Overlooked by the Western canon: Why Mykhailo Kotsiubynskyi matters...
title_en: Kyiv: Overlooked by the Western canon: Why Mykhailo Kotsiubynskyi matters...
title_uk: Київ: Поза увагою західного канону: Чому Михайло Коцюбинський важливий...
description: Overlooked by the Western canon: Why Mykhailo Kotsiubynskyi matters now In an age where minds rarely know rest, the craving for true stillness feels almost radical. Long before smartphones and social feeds, Ukrainian writer Mykhailo Kotsiubynskyi sensed this human need with startling clarity. More than a century ago, he created a literary masterpiece that feels uncannily modern—a quiet refuge on...
